resources.string: If this MUD supports GMCP Char.Login, the primary login and password below can be used for automatic login. Extra account slots are notes only. Saved as plain text on this device — leave blank if you do not want passwords stored here.
Tap a slot to edit. Delete removes it.

BlowTorch 2

• Works on current Android
• Shared /BlowTorch/ folder or system file pickers
• Edit/Send input bar, swipe/hold/accordion buttons
• Session logs, .search, .wrap, .kb, GMCP helpers

Full notes: in-app Help, or the project README.
BlowTorch 2 (test build)\n\nSame app as production, separate package so you can install both. Expect experiments and more bugs.
To keep files that survive uninstall, grant access to shared storage.
BlowTorch needs storage access to import and export profiles from /BlowTorch/ on your device. Network access (INTERNET) is granted at install time.
Storage: %1$s. Internet access is enabled at install; restrict it in system app settings if needed.
Found %1$d profile(s) in app storage and added to the list.
Permission denied for %1$s. Tap Try again or open App settings.
%1$s needs permissions you denied. Open App settings to allow storage, notifications, or network access.
Shared storage access granted. External writes go to:\n%1$s
Shared storage access denied. External writes go to:\n%1$s\nThat folder is removed when you uninstall the app.
Loading files from:\n%1$s\nThis folder is removed when you uninstall the app.
